_comment: Canonical-facts registry for Praxis. Machine-checkable single-source-of-truth guards consumed by validate-plugin.sh (Phase 1). Extend forbiddenTerms as terminology evolves.

forbiddenTerms.reason: wave product-architecture is 'the educated theory', not 'the bet'
mantra is 'Wave = educated theory; capability record = truth'
renamed to 'four-condition disjointness' (the rule has four conditions)
canonical test pyramid is Logic -> Composition -> Adapter Contract -> Integration -> Journey

the lite/standard adoption profile dial was cut pre-release (never shipped in a tagged version, confirmed via git merge-base against v0.3.0) -- full is the only supported profile; do not reintroduce without real-repo evidence per the evolution policy
the three-way adoption-profile enum was cut pre-release; full is the only supported profile

requiredPhrases.reason: README's opening pitch must disclose the three-tier enforcement split so adopters don't over-trust a green check; see skills/using-praxis/SKILL.md's Enforcement model section (Course Correction Phase A1).
